mapper.select: SELECT trade_date, quote_time, last_price, change_percent, open_price, high_price, low_price, previous_close_price, daily_volume_tons, daily_turnover_cny, cumulative_volume_tons, cumulative_turnover_cny, daily_volume_text, daily_turnover_text, cumulative_volume_text, cumulative_turnover_text, synced_at FROM social.carbon_market_realtime_snapshot ORDER BY trade_date DESC, quote_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT trade_date, open_price, close_price, low_price, high_price, volume_tons FROM social.carbon_market_daily_kline ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
